old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.59.2","title":"Validate Zephyr IPv6 and routing rows","description":"Scope under project-LICHEN-2auf.59: validate only recovered routing, RPL, ICMPv6, and ping_l2 behavior on all declared native_sim/native/64 and applicable QEMU scenarios from a fresh clean EBS worktree. Use profile personal in account 210337117346, region us-west-2, an owned tagged builder in us-west-2c, and exact approved volume vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb. Preserve per-slice base commit, applied commit/binary-patch SHA-256, west manifest, Zephyr/SDK/compiler versions, full command/cwd/environment, UTC timing, exit status, logs and artifact hashes. Require observable runtime assertions for each declared scenario; a build-only substitution, missing target, skip, timeout, ignored nonzero exit, stale artifact, or dirty worktree fails closed. Exclude puck/L2 and other link-specific .35.6 rows.
